implementationScope: Wire transport-mux normalized cost records into an injected cost/event sink and SDK journal/L6 cost tracking integration boundary.
Add runId/sessionId/trace correlation request context for HTTP and WebSocket proxy requests without leaking internal metadata upstream by default.
Expose deterministic pluggable codec registration/discovery backed by explicit plugin or atlas metadata.
Share tool schema normalization between tool-mux and transport-mux without circular package coupling.
Update tests and scorecard-facing documentation or metadata needed to keep transport-mux provisional cutover truthful.
qualityGates: Phase 0 reuse-audit findings are rendered before architecture work.
Runtime call paths are traced before implementation and recorded in the architecture output.
Tests are authored before implementation and cover buffered, streaming, WebSocket, passthrough, and codec/plugin behavior.
Cost emission is verified to happen exactly once per usage-bearing buffered completion or stream done event.
Session/run/trace context is available to sinks and traces and stripped from upstream passthrough unless explicitly allowed.
Codec discovery is deterministic and duplicate/unknown codec behavior is tested.
tool-mux and transport-mux schema translation share a canonical path with no circular dependency.
Architecture/privacy review and final acceptance review both approve before delivery.
